historyScreenTitle.desc: App bar title on the personal history screen listing all logged entries.

historyDeleteEntryTitle.desc: Confirmation dialog title shown before deleting a history entry.

historyDeleteEntryBody.desc: Confirmation dialog body warning that deleting an entry is permanent.

historyStatJournalThisWeek.desc: Label under a summary stat chip showing the count of journal entries logged in the past week.

historyStatGratitudeThisWeek.desc: Label under a summary stat chip showing the count of gratitude entries logged in the past week.

historyStatDaysSober.desc: Label under a summary stat chip showing how many days the user has been sober.

historyDaysShort.desc: Compact days value, e.g. '12d' for 12 days, shown in a stat chip.

historyCardJournal.desc: Type label at the top of a journal entry card in the history list.

historyTapToReadMore.desc: Hint under a long, collapsed journal entry inviting the user to tap to expand it.

historyCardGratitude.desc: Type label at the top of a gratitude entry card in the history list.

historyCardCraving.desc: Type label at the top of a craving entry card in the history list.

historyCardThought.desc: Type label at the top of a thought entry card in the history list.

historyActivityRun.desc: Name of the 'run' physical activity type, shown on an activity card.

historyActivityCycle.desc: Name of the 'cycle' physical activity type, shown on an activity card.

historyActivitySwim.desc: Name of the 'swim' physical activity type, shown on an activity card.

historyActivityWeights.desc: Name of the 'weights' (weight training) physical activity type, shown on an activity card.

historyActivityGeneric.desc: Fallback name for an unrecognised physical activity type, shown on an activity card.

historyActivityDistanceTime.desc: Sub-label on an activity card showing distance in km and duration in minutes.

historySleepHours.desc: Sleep duration shown on a sleep entry card, e.g. '7.5 hours'.

historySleepQuality.desc: Sleep quality label on a sleep entry card, where {quality} is a word like Poor/Fair/OK/Good/Great.

historySlipReset.desc: Badge on a slip entry card indicating the sobriety streak was reset at that point.

historySlipSoberAtTime.desc: Line on a slip card showing how long the user was sober when the slip occurred; {streak} is a phrase like '12 days sober'.

historyEmptyAllTitle.desc: Empty-state title when the unfiltered history list has no entries.

historyEmptyAllSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle when the unfiltered history list has no entries.

historyEmptyCravingsTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to cravings and there are none.

historyEmptyCravingsSub.en: Log your cravings from the home screen
historyEmptyCravingsSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log cravings from the home screen.

historyEmptyThoughtsTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to thoughts and there are none.

historyEmptyThoughtsSub.en: Log your thoughts from the home screen
historyEmptyThoughtsSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log thoughts from the home screen.

historyEmptyActivityTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to exercise/activity and there is none.

historyEmptyActivitySub.en: Log your exercise from the home screen
historyEmptyActivitySub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log exercise/activity from the home screen.

historyEmptySleepTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to sleep and there are none.

historyEmptySleepSub.en: Log your sleep from the home screen
historyEmptySleepSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log sleep from the home screen.

historyEmptyJournalTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to journal entries and there are none.

historyEmptyJournalSub.en: Log your journal entries from the home screen
historyEmptyJournalSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log journal entries from the home screen.

historyEmptyGratitudeTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to gratitude notes and there are none.

historyEmptyGratitudeSub.en: Log your gratitude notes from the home screen
historyEmptyGratitudeSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log gratitude notes from the home screen.

historyEmptySlipsTitle.desc: Empty-state title shown when the history list is filtered to slips and there are none.

historyEmptySlipsSub.en: Log your slips from the home screen
historyEmptySlipsSub.desc: Empty-state subtitle prompting the user to log slips from the home screen.
